plugins.name: postgres-skill-creator
plugins.description: Introspect a Postgres database and generate a project-level skill that bakes its schema into a reference for ad-hoc query and exploration work

plugins.name: file-library
plugins.description: Tools for building Go file library packages: scaffolding, spec extraction, and feature implementation

plugins.name: audit-skill
plugins.description: Statically audit a Claude Code skill against four quality objectives: idempotency, reproducibility, context management, and strict definitions

plugins.name: kafka-skill-creator
plugins.description: Generate a per-team Kafka research skill from a manifest, baking owned topics and consumer groups into a project-level skill for self-service investigation
